set.body: Two or three scripts: benchmark-flagship-many-y.R, benchmark-model-core.R, and possibly demo-flagship-workflows.R (assess whether this is a benchmark or purely a demo <e2><80><94> if demo, move to inst/examples/ or vignettes/ and out of tools/). Ops: many_lm, many_lm_mixed, kernel_model_fit. These are end-to-end user-visible workflows and must also report rows-per-second throughput alongside median_ms. Add baseline rows.
set.title: Rehabilitate flagship/workflow benchmarks (flagship-many-y, model-core, chained-dense assessed)
